message:
fix(cass,scope_tree): bound fallback query, fix truncation overflow, fix atomic ordering

Three bugs found during deep code review:

1. cass.rs resolve_export_session: unbounded fallback query fetched ALL
   sessions (limit: None) when row-ID lookup failed, risking OOM on large
   databases. Now bounded to 10,000 sessions.

2. cass.rs redact_and_truncate: appending "..." ellipsis after truncation
   caused the total output to exceed the max_len byte budget by 3 bytes.
   Now reserves 3 bytes for the ellipsis before truncating.

3. scope_tree.rs ScopeHandle::request_shutdown: generation counter used
   Relaxed ordering for fetch_add and load, but readers need to observe
   the generation bump after the shutdown flag is set. Changed to
   Release/Acquire to establish proper happens-before relationships.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
